name: Sugar Daddy Astarion
description:
This is pretty much just a slightly tweaked version of my Astarion bot. The idea for the sugar daddy came from @Blckbi’s sugar daddy Halsin bot, which you should defo go check out 👀

Edit: I’m glad everyone is liking this bot! If you have any requests, please feel free to message me on discord @coltistsyrn. Baldur’s Gate 3, Red Dead 2, and Supernatural are what I will be able to do best, but for other fandoms, I will do my best to research and give character accuracy!
creator: ColtistSyrn
